description: Plaid Identity Verification Link session (products:['identity_verification'], template-driven). Sandbox sequence per AskBill 2026-06-12: consent → phone → SMS 11111 → PII form → kyc_check (runs) → documentary_verification (runs, simulated as Leslie Knope 1975-01-18) → selfie_check NOT run in sandbox → completion. onSuccess = submitted, not passed; verdict via /identity_verification/get.

screens.notes: First IDV pane ('Basic information' / 'Where do you live?'): country dropdown, US preselected — just Continue. Observed Gringo 2026-06-12.
Token sets identity_verification.gave_consent:true — this pane does NOT render in our pipeline apps. Kept for templates without pre-consent.

IDV phone pane uses inputmode=numeric (NOT type=tel) with separate +1 country code — fill NATIONAL digits (2345678909). CTA: Send verification code. Observed Gringo 2026-06-12. WARNING: the sandbox helper rail renders INSIDE the IDV iframe and repeats Country/Phone/DOB labels on every pane — probes must use pane-body phrasing, never field labels.

detect.label: unknown
detect.textProbe: should match what is on your government

screens.notes: Date-of-birth pane ('This should match what is on your government-issued ID'). Masked MM/DD/YYYY — type 01181975 as keystrokes. Observed Gringo 2026-06-12.
IDV SMS pane: 'Verify phone number / Enter the 5-digit code sent to…' — FIVE separate digit boxes; type 11111 into the first box (focus auto-advances). Sandbox code 11111. Observed Gringo 2026-06-12.

'Good news, we found an identity linked to your phone number' — Leslie Knope autofill review (name, address, SSN on file) + Confirm and Continue. Replaces the manual pii-form when the phone matches a known identity. Observed Gringo 2026-06-12.

Multi-field form (name, DOB, address, SSN). The settle between fields IS the human tell — a real person tabs/clicks between inputs with pauses. Fields prefilled via the link token's user{} are omitted. Exact Leslie Knope data required for kyc_check pass. OPTIONAL: only when no identity is linked to the phone — identity-review replaces it on the happy path.
Data-source verification spinner — wait, don't act. p90 floor from calibration matters most here.

'Use your phone — Scan this code with your phone's camera': desktop doc-capture is phone-handoff-only for this template (NO buttons/file input/desktop path). TERMINAL for desktop automation — recorder relies on its deterministic completion fallback here. Observed Gringo 2026-06-12.

Only when the template requires documentary verification (or as KYC-fail fallback). Sandbox treats ANY uploaded image as a genuine Leslie Knope document. Desktop sessions hit doc-qr-handoff instead; this screen applies only if the template offers on-device upload.
selfie_check is NOT run in sandbox even when template-enabled; UI step may still render. Calibration must record what actually appears for our template (idvtmp_75VaHqzaX1ZJxK).
_idvComplete set by host onSuccess. Status via /identity_verification/get steps{}.

notes: IDV sessions RESUME by phone-linked identity: a re-launch with the same phone (+12345678909) skips already-completed steps (observed resume at SMS and at doc-QR). Calibration/re-records start mid-flow after a prior partial session.
